seoTitle: Kondinin vs Konnongorring — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kondinin and Konnongorring. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kondinin and Konnongorring.
heading: Kondinin vs Konnongorring — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kondinin, Western Australia and Konnongorring, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kondinin has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Konnongorring (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kondinin or Konnongorring safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kondinin has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Konnongorring scores 49/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kondinin scores 52/100 for bushfire risk. Konnongorring scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kondinin or Konnongorring?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kondinin has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
